allow: Bash(grep -r "loading\\|error\\|disabled" /home/runner/workspace/client/src/pages/*.tsx | head -20)
Bash(grep -r "alt=" /home/runner/workspace/client/src/pages/*.tsx | head -10)
Bash(echo $DATABASE_URL | head -c 50)
Bash(printenv | grep -i database)
Bash(psql $NEON_DATABASE_URL -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM politician_profiles;" 2>&1)
Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM politician_profiles;" 2>&1)
Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "SELECT name, party, position, state, corruption_grade FROM politician_profiles WHERE position ILIKE '%president%' LIMIT 5;" 2>&1)
Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "\\d politician_profiles" 2>&1)

Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "SELECT pp.full_name, pp.party, pp.corruption_grade, pos.title, pos.state FROM politician_profiles pp LEFT JOIN political_positions pos ON pp.position_id = pos.id WHERE pos.title ILIKE '%president%' OR pp.full_name ILIKE '%trump%' OR pp.full_name ILIKE '%biden%' LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)
Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "\\d political_positions" 2>&1)

Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "SELECT pp.full_name, pp.party, pp.corruption_grade, pos.title, pos.jurisdiction FROM politician_profiles pp LEFT JOIN political_positions pos ON pp.position_id = pos.id WHERE pos.title ILIKE '%president%' LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "
SELECT 
  corruption_grade,
  COUNT\(*\) as count,
  COUNT\(fec_candidate_id\) as has_fec_id,
  COUNT\(total_contributions\) as has_contributions,
  COUNT\(numeric_score\) as has_numeric_score
FROM politician_profiles
GROUP BY corruption_grade
ORDER BY corruption_grade NULLS LAST;" 2>&1)

Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "
SELECT 
  pp.full_name,
  pp.party,
  pp.corruption_grade,
  pp.fec_candidate_id,
  pp.total_contributions,
  pos.title,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM politician_sig_sponsorships pss WHERE pss.politician_id = pp.id\) as sig_count
FROM politician_profiles pp
LEFT JOIN political_positions pos ON pp.position_id = pos.id
WHERE pp.corruption_grade IS NULL
ORDER BY pos.title
LIMIT 20;" 2>&1)

Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "
SELECT 
  pos.title,
  COUNT\(*\) as total,
  COUNT\(pp.corruption_grade\) as graded,
  COUNT\(*\) - COUNT\(pp.corruption_grade\) as ungraded
FROM politician_profiles pp
LEFT JOIN political_positions pos ON pp.position_id = pos.id
GROUP BY pos.title
ORDER BY ungraded DESC
LIMIT 15;" 2>&1)

Bash(psql $DATABASE_URL -c "
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE sig_count > 0 AND corruption_grade IS NULL\) as has_sigs_no_grade,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE sig_count = 0 AND corruption_grade IS NULL\) as no_sigs_no_grade,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE sig_count > 0 AND corruption_grade IS NOT NULL\) as has_sigs_has_grade,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE sig_count = 0 AND corruption_grade IS NOT NULL\) as no_sigs_has_grade
FROM \(
  SELECT pp.corruption_grade, COUNT\(pss.id\) as sig_count
  FROM politician_profiles pp
  LEFT JOIN politician_sig_sponsorships pss ON pss.politician_id = pp.id
  GROUP BY pp.id, pp.corruption_grade
\) sub;" 2>&1)
Bash(ls /home/runner/workspace/*.env /home/runner/workspace/.env* 2>/dev/null; printenv DATABASE_URL | head -c 50)
